summary: Address Management Feature Testing Complete - All backend API endpoints and frontend UI components working correctly. Tested GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/customer/addresses endpoints and CartPage address selection integration.
passed_tests: GET /api/customer/addresses - Returns saved addresses for logged in customer
POST /api/customer/addresses - Creates new address and returns address_id
Address endpoints require authentication (401 for unauthenticated requests)
CartPage - Shipping address section displays correctly
CartPage - New address form has all required fields (full_name, street, city, postal_code, country)
CartPage - Address form fields are fillable and functional
CartPage - Save address button works and shows success toast
CartPage - Saved addresses are displayed with selection capability
CartPage - 'Add New Address' button appears when addresses exist
CartPage - Checkout button enabled when address is selected/filled
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly set in CartPage.js for testing
Address validation in backend requires full_name, street, city, postal_code, country
Frontend properly handles both saved addresses display and new address form
Checkout button correctly disabled until address is selected or form is filled
seed_data_creation: Test addresses created during testing are cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Address management feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/customer/addresses work correctly. Frontend CartPage.js has shipping address section with: 1) Display of saved addresses with selection, 2) New address form with all required fields, 3) Save functionality with success feedback, 4) Checkout button state management based on address selection. All data-testid attributes are in place for automated testing.

backend_address_endpoints.details: All CRUD operations for customer addresses work correctly. Authentication required for all endpoints.

frontend_address_selection.details: CartPage displays shipping address section with saved addresses list and new address form. Selection and save functionality working.

checkout_integration.details: Checkout button state correctly reflects address selection. Address is sent to payment system via shipping_address in create-checkout request.

translations.details: Address form labels translated correctly (tested in French: 'Adresse de Livraison', 'Nom Complet', 'Rue', 'Ville', 'Code Postal', 'Pays')

screenshots: .screenshots/cart_after_save.png - Cart after saving address showing saved address selected
